Tree Component Showcase

Basic Tree

A simple tree component with default settings, showing a file system structure.

Selection Modes

Demonstrates different selection modes: none, single, and multiple.

Tree with Checkboxes

Tree with checkboxes for selecting multiple items.

Tree with Lines

Tree with connecting lines between nodes.

Searchable Tree

Tree with search functionality.

Drag and Drop

Tree with drag and drop capabilities for reorganizing nodes.

Organization Chart

Tree representing an organization structure.

Category Hierarchy

Tree representing a product category hierarchy.
